steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank fills "Although ______ particles range in size..." The noun being modified is "particles" belonging to the Andromedid meteoroid stream — a singular entity. The blank needs a possessive determiner (meaning "belonging to the stream"), not a pronoun standing alone.

steps.title: Choose the correct possessive
steps.content: Rule: a possessive determiner must match the antecedent (the stream) in number and must be a true possessive, not a contraction. A. "their" — plural possessive. Fails: the Andromedid meteoroid stream is singular, not plural. B. "they're" — contraction of "they are." Fails: this is a verb phrase, not a possessive, and the sentence would read "they are particles range," which is ungrammatical. C. "it's" — contraction of "it is." Fails: same error as B — "it is particles range" is ungrammatical. D. "its" — singular possessive (no apostrophe). Correctly shows the particles belong to the singular Andromedid stream. Correct. That matches choice D — D is correct.
